expectations.text: Uses the correct SSH command or alias to connect to srv3
expectations.evidence: Used ssh with correct identity file and IP address for srv3.

expectations.text: Runs docker service ls or equivalent to list running services
expectations.evidence: Output shows all 6 services with images and replica counts.

expectations.text: Reads or references deploy-test/docker-stack.yml for expected versions
expectations.evidence: Shows deploy-test branch image versions AND additionally compared main branch versions.

expectations.text: Explicitly compares running vs expected image tags
expectations.evidence: Full comparison table with Match? column. Found vue-members mismatch (1.0.4 running vs 1.0.3 in deploy-test). Also compared main branch showing significant drift.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to SSH into srv2 or production
